chunks.title: Warning Against the Wicked
chunks.reason: Direct address to avoid envy of evil men.

chunks.title: Wisdom and Strength
chunks.reason: Logical argument connecting wisdom to building, strength, and divine justice.

chunks.title: Wisdom Like Honey
chunks.reason: Metaphorical instruction on the value of wisdom for the soul.

chunks.title: Attitude Toward Enemies and Evildoers
chunks.reason: Instructions on not plotting against the righteous and not fretting at the wicked.

chunks.title: Fear God and the King
chunks.reason: Direct command to respect authority and avoid fickle men.

chunks.title: Sayings on Judgment
chunks.reason: Collection of proverbs regarding partiality and reproof.

chunks.title: Practical Instructions
chunks.reason: Rules for work order, testimony, and retaliation.

chunks.title: The Sluggard's Field
chunks.reason: Narrative observation of a neglected field leading to a lesson on poverty.
